zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Arches於1412年1月1日出生在英國維爾爾斯普爾 艾希頓時，她的父親Sir Richard De Arches II29歲，母親Joan Arden38歲。她於1434年7月12日與Sir John de Dinham在英國可瓦爾卡迪納姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年4月20日在英國戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Arches于1412年1月1日出生在英国維爾爾斯普爾 艾希頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard De Arches II29岁，母亲Joan Arden38岁。她于1434年7月12日与Sir John de Dinham在英国可瓦爾卡迪納姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年4月20日在英国戴文伍德伯里 煙雨 艾可頓享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arches
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, English: locative name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime). The name was sometimes reduced to   Arch  .
2 English: variant of Arch with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Arch
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living by a bridge, from Middle English, Old French arche ‘arch’ (i.e. of a bridge).
English (of Norman origin): shortened form of Arches, a habitational name from any of various places in France called Arques (Eure, Pas-de-Calais, Seine-Maritime).
Germanized form of Slovenian Arh: from a shortened form of the personal name Areh, an old vernacular form of Henrik (see Henry 1).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Arches was born on 1 January 1412, in Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Richard De Arches II, was 29 and her mother, Joan Arden, was 38. She married Sir John de Dinham on 12 July 1434, in Cardinham, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 April 1497, in Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Arches est née le 1 janvier 1412, à Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard De Arches II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Arden, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Dinham le 12 juillet 1434, à Cardinham, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1497, à Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Steeple Ashton, Oxfordshire, England: Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Arches am 1. Januar 1412 in Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard De Arches II 29 und ihre Mutter Joan Arden 38. Sie hat am 12. Juli 1434 in Cardinham, Cornwall, England Sir John de Dinham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. April 1497 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Arches è nata il il 1 gennaio 1412 nel Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard De Arches II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joan Arden, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Dinham il 12 luglio 1434, nel Cardinham, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1497, nel Woodbury with Exton, Devon, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Archesが1412年1月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアスティープル アシュトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard De Arches IIは29歳，母Joan Ardenは38歳であった。1434年7月12日にイギリスコルンワルカーディンハムでSir John de Dinhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年4月20日にイギリスデボンウッドブリー ウィス エクストンで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Arches(이)가 1412년 1월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 스티플 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard De Arches II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Arden(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1434년 7월 12일 영국 코른월 카딘함에서 Sir John de Dinham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 4월 20일 영국 데폰 우드버이 위스 스턴에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1412–20 April 1497: 1 de janeiro de 1412–20 de abril de 1497
pt.Steeple Ashton, Oxfordshire, England: Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Arches nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1412, em Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard De Arches II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Arden, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Dinham em 12 de julho de 1434, em Cardinham, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1497, em Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Steeple Ashton, Oxfordshire, England: Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Arches родилась 1 января 1412 г. в местности стипл аштон, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard De Arches II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Arden, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Dinham 12 июля 1434 г. в местности кардинам, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 апреля 1497 г. в местности вудбури вит экстон, девон, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Arches nació el 1 de enero de 1412, en Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard De Arches II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Arden, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir John de Dinham el 12 de julio de 1434, en Cardinham, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1497, en Woodbury with Exton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
